footer.desc: Vietnamese culture localized economy RPG & AI Waifu Discord Bot.
footer.copyright: © {year} Waguri Bot. All rights reserved by the Waguri development team.

hero.subtitle: Experience a fun RPG world, work, career progression, high-stakes minigames, clans, and chat with sweet Waguri Kaoruko right on your Discord server!

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Explore the unique pieces that make up the colorful world of Waguri
features.ai_chat_desc: Super smooth Gemini AI integration, remembers nicknames and automatically stores memories to make conversations sweet and personal.
features.economy_desc: Work system, unlock 13 professions, buy vehicles for travel, rank up, and upgrade Gekka Bakery to bake cakes for coins.
features.minigames_desc: Test your luck with Loto, Bingo, Dice, Fish-Prawn-Crab, and intense card games right inside your Discord server.
features.clans_desc: Form clans to grind, distribute clan dividends, manage Gekka Bakery together, and hire NPC staff to get rich collectively.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: It's super simple! Just click the 'Invite Waguri to Discord' button, add the bot to your server, and type `/start` or `/help` for detailed instructions.
faq.q2: What is the daily check-in command?
faq.a2: Use `/daily` to get check-in coins every day. Checking in consecutively (streaks) will multiply your rewards significantly!
faq.q3: How does the AI chat feature work?
faq.a3: You can type `/ask <message>` or ping the bot directly in the chat channel. Waguri will automatically detect your language and reply sweetly.
faq.q4: How do I earn the most coins?
faq.a4: Use `/work` regularly, complete `/quest` daily, go `/fish` or `/mine` for ingredients, then bake them in `/tiembanh` to sell cakes for profit!

skills.0: 🐱 Increases chance of catching tasty fish by 2%.
skills.1: 💫 Increases chance of catching ultra rare fish by 5% (Golden Arowana/Japanese Koi).
skills.2: 💰 Skill [Fortune Beckoner]: Receive random 1,000 - 3,000 coins daily upon login.

skills.1: 🚨 Reduces police suspicion build-up by 15% during shady work.
skills.2: 🐕 Skill [Loyalty]: Protects 25% of wallet balance from being stolen in a robbery.

skills.0: 🐲 Increases EXP gained from all activities by 5%.
skills.1: ✨ Gain additional +15% EXP from all activities.
skills.2: ⏳ Skill [Time Lord]: Reduces cooldown time of all harvesting actions by 50%.
🎭 Skill [Illusion]: Unveils 1 unopened Bingo slot in advance.

skills.0: 🐰 Reduces energy cost for chopping wood / mining by 5%.
skills.1: 🥗 Reduces energy cost for working by 15%.
skills.2: 💤 Skill [Dreamy]: Recover energy twice as fast while sleeping (/nghingoi).

skills.0: 🐻 Increases base salary by 5% when working (/work).
skills.1: 💎 Increases drop rate of precious ores (Diamond/Gold) by 10% when mining.
skills.2: 🌋 Skill [Seismic]: Each mining action has a 2% chance to multiply yield by 5x.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: A few common questions before you get started with Waguri 🌸
faq.a1: Absolutely free! Invite the bot and play as much as you like. The Premium package is just an optional donation to unlock extra perks.
faq.a2: Invite Waguri to your server, type /start to create a character and receive a welcome gift, and run /daily every day to build your capital.
faq.q3: Are my coins and data secure?
faq.a3: Yes. All coin transactions are handled using atomic RPC on PostgreSQL (preventing bugs & exploits), with data securely stored on Supabase.
faq.q4: Is my wallet shared across servers?
faq.a4: Yes! Your wallet is shared across all servers. Leaderboards are available both globally and per server.
faq.a5: 150 AI chats/day, +10% earnings on all income commands, a 💎 badge, and early access to new features.
faq.q6: What should I do if I encounter a bug or lose coins?
faq.a6: Join the support server to open a ticket or report it in the #report-bug channel. Valid bugs can also be rewarded with gifts 💝.
